project.name: BotBot
project.one_liner: Bolt intuitive-AI cognitive architecture onto OpenClaw as a Python sidecar brain service
project.why: Give OpenClaw agents a real mind — memory with evolving weights, gut feeling, consolidation, daydreaming, safety monitoring
success_criteria: Brain service runs as Docker sidecar alongside OpenClaw
OpenClaw agents have persistent memory with Beta-distributed weights
Gut feeling system produces emotional signals from experience
Consolidation runs background processing (insights, decay, promotion)
DMN generates spontaneous thoughts during idle time
Safety monitor prevents runaway weight escalation
Multiple agents supported via agent_id namespacing
non_goals: Porting the dashboard or metacognition modules

deploy_policy.forbidden: No direct production deploys without approval

kb_policy: Every feature/fix includes a KB update under KB/.
KB changes require explicit human review/approval before the related task is considered done.
change_policy: Make only the minimum necessary edits for the current task.
No opportunistic refactors/cleanup/reformatting unless explicitly requested and approved.
Do not summarize/rewrite existing content in a way that can drop context or functionality.
anti_drift_rules: Do not change scope without explicit approval
Do not refactor unless it is the current task
Ask if unclear - do not assume
Minimum changes only - no 'while I'm here'
NEVER deploy without local test + approval

principles: Speculation only on explicit human request.
